issues.description:
## Input
Follow-up from [DEV-82](mention://issue/f5b0da68-4c0b-4edf-894a-1e0f146b4fda) QA verification. Skill `parallel-issue-dispatcher` (ID: `9f4b229b-4f75-454b-9548-2df4e4b80916`) is registered and tested, but sprint-commander has not been configured to invoke it automatically after parent build plans are finalized.

## Expected Output
sprint-commander invokes `parallel-issue-dispatcher` automatically when a parent issue has ≥3 sub-issues in `backlog` with mixed dependencies. Until then, ceo or sprint-commander can call it manually.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] sprint-commander's instructions/skill list include `parallel-issue-dispatcher` as a default tool to consider after build-plan creation.
- [ ] First real dispatch validates Step 6 (re-run on sub-issue `done` cascades unblocking).
- [ ] Any defect found on first real use is filed as a follow-up against [DEV-98](mention://issue/2b595f8a-ea02-4677-b9a2-87f0edf2cb61).

## Dependencies
- [DEV-98](mention://issue/2b595f8a-ea02-4677-b9a2-87f0edf2cb61) — skill spec (done)
- [DEV-82](mention://issue/f5b0da68-4c0b-4edf-894a-1e0f146b4fda) — skill build (done)

## Risk
Low. Configuration change only; reversible.

## Definition of Done
sprint-commander references the skill in its operating instructions and has used it on at least one real parent issue. Step 6 cascade validated or follow-up filed.
issues.title: Wire parallel-issue-dispatcher into sprint-commander trigger list

issues.description:
## SKILL IMPORT: mcp-memory-service

**Source:** https://github.com/doobidoo/mcp-memory-service
**License:** Apache 2.0 (green)
**Stars:** 1,888 | **Last commit:** 2026-05-26 (v10.66.0, very actively maintained)

### What it does
Self-hosted persistent cross-agent memory backend. Exposes an MCP server with tools for:
- `store_memory` / `retrieve_memory` / `search_similar` — semantic vector search via sqlite-vec
- `get_knowledge_graph` — causal knowledge graph across agent sessions
- `delete_memory` / `consolidate_memories` — autonomous pattern/trend detection

Works with Claude Code, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen. REST API + MCP + OAuth + dashboard.

### Proposed Multica MCP name
`mcp-memory-service`

### PR-Ready Spec
- **Install:** `pip install mcp-memory-service`; configure via MCP stdio or HTTP
- **Config:** `MEMORY_SERVICE_URL` env var; no external API keys; data stays local (sqlite-vec backend)
- **Integration points:** Add to workspace MCP config so all Multica agents share a persistent memory store
- **Agent benefit:** Eliminates comment-archaeology problem across multi-day builds; agents can recall prior decisions without re-reading 2000-comment threads

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] mcp-memory-service Docker image or pip install runs on workspace infra
- [ ] MCP config registered in workspace settings
- [ ] At least one Multica agent (e.g., github-analyst) successfully stores and retrieves a memory
- [ ] Security review sub-issue returns `decision=green`

### Dependencies
- Security review sub-issue (sibling, assigned to security-auditor) must be `done` + `decision=green` before this issue is promoted to `todo`

### Risk
- Writable to disk; network exposure via HTTP; consolidation scheduler runs background tasks
- Requires dedicated infra or Docker container in workspace

### Definition of Done
- MCP config documented in workspace CLAUDE.md
- At least one integration test passes
- Security review cleared
issues.title: SKILL IMPORT: mcp-memory-service
